calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Jan-06-2022 Set For Trial On Jan-06-22 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 611

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-05-2022 Continued To Jan-06-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-06-2022 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kelly Bowhay Plaintiff/Respondent in pro per
Haley Gonzalba authorized to appear for Defendant/Appellant
Laith Salma appears to testify for Defendant/Appellant

This case comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Kelly Bowhay, Plaintiff/Respondent, testifies on her own behalf.
Laith Salma cross-examines Plaintiff/Respondent

Laith Salma and Haley Gonzalba testify on behalf of Defendant/Appellant

Laith Salma and Haley Gonzalba present a folder of images:

Exhibit A: Images of Plaintiffs furniture against floor during tenancy
Exhibit B: Images of unit after Move-out Inspection
Exhibit C: Documents presented to Plaintiff for Painting the apartment
Exhibit D: Invoice from vendors

Kelly Bowhay, Plaintiff/Respondent states her rebuttal.

All exhibits are returned to parties.

At the conclusion of the trial, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow, Clerk: K. Septien, Not Reported, (611).

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-30-2021 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-18-2021 Continued To Sep-30-21 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 506
